text.name: breed_gloucestershire_old_spot
text.text: Gloucestershire Old Spot

text.name: breed_blue_faced_leicester
text.text: Blue Faced Leicester

text.name: fillType_bull_jersey
text.text: Jersey Bull

text.name: fillType_boar_gloucestershire_old_spot
text.text: Gloucestershire Old Spot Boar

text.name: fillType_ram_texel
text.text: Texel Ram

text.name: fillType_ram_suffolk
text.text: Suffolk Ram

text.name: fillType_ram_blue_faced_leicester
text.text: Blue Faced Leicester Ram

text.name: fillType_rabbit_male
text.text: Buck Rabbit

text.name: rl_bridge_bullJerseyCalfDesc
text.text: A young male Jersey calf. Bulls that are healthy and older than 12 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_bullJerseyYoungDesc
text.text: A young Jersey bull. Bulls that are healthy and older than 12 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_bullJerseyAdultDesc
text.text: An adult Jersey bull. Bulls that are healthy and older than 12 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_boarGOSPigletDesc
text.text: A young male Gloucestershire Old Spot piglet. Boars that are healthy and older than 8 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_boarGOSYoungDesc
text.text: A young male Gloucestershire Old Spot pig. Boars that are healthy and older than 8 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_boarGOSAdultDesc
text.text: An adult Gloucestershire Old Spot boar. Boars that are healthy and older than 8 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_ramTexelLambDesc
text.text: A young male Texel lamb. Rams that are healthy and older than 5 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_ramTexelYoungDesc
text.text: A young Texel ram. Rams that are healthy and older than 5 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_ramTexelAdultDesc
text.text: An adult Texel ram. Rams that are healthy and older than 5 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_ramSuffolkLambDesc
text.text: A young male Suffolk lamb. Rams that are healthy and older than 5 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_ramSuffolkYoungDesc
text.text: A young Suffolk ram. Rams that are healthy and older than 5 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_ramSuffolkAdultDesc
text.text: An adult Suffolk ram. Rams that are healthy and older than 5 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_ramBFLLambDesc
text.text: A young male Blue Faced Leicester lamb. Rams that are healthy and older than 5 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_ramBFLYoungDesc
text.text: A young Blue Faced Leicester ram. Rams that are healthy and older than 5 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_ramBFLAdultDesc
text.text: An adult Blue Faced Leicester ram. Rams that are healthy and older than 5 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_rabbitMaleBabyDesc
text.text: A young male rabbit (buck). Bucks that are healthy and older than 4 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_rabbitMaleDesc
text.text: A male rabbit (buck). Bucks that are healthy and older than 4 months can reproduce.
